# Skinfactor

**Summary**: A measure of the extra pressure drop caused by damage near the wellbore.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] calculated skin factor to quantify the impact of drilling fluid on production.

## Scientific Context

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] Used to quantify the impact of drilling fluid on production.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] Calculated from flow data and pressure measurements.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- As flooding time increases, the skin factor increased due to permeability impairment and invasion depth. ([[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001, p. 17]])
- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] Increased with flooding time.
